response.justification: While James demonstrates impressive general software development expertise across multiple languages and platforms, he lacks critical requirements for this embedded security role. Native Japanese proficiency is a stated requirement but entirely absent from the resume. His 15-year career trajectory shows a heavy focus on web services and backend systems rather than embedded firmware development. Most significantly, there is no evidence of security domain expertise (cryptography, authentication protocols, encryption technologies) or embedded networking knowledge—both central to this security-focused LAN-switch role. His recent C/embedded systems experience dates to 2014-2015; his current focus is TypeScript/Node.js and AI infrastructure.
strengths: Extensive software development experience (15+ years) with strong polyglot programming and software craftsmanship practices
Demonstrated expertise in complex system design, testing methodologies (TDD), and infrastructure challenges at scale
Some C/C++ and Linux systems experience from National Instruments role, showing capability with lower-level programming
concerns: Native Japanese language proficiency not mentioned; this is a stated hard requirement for the role
No demonstrated security domain expertise—no mention of cryptography, encryption, authentication protocols, MACsec, or 802.1X
Career heavily focused on web/backend services and full-stack development; minimal embedded firmware or networking protocol experience

key_factors.factor: Embedded systems experience limited and dated (2014-2015)
